Buyers with an active K2K connection that purchased through the Offline channel only from Apr 1 to Jul 15, 2026 (online = $0 for the whole period). July is partial. Sorted by connection date, newest first.

Online Decline: connections still transacting online but whose online sales are falling month over month (Jan→Jun slope negative) and in June sit ≥25% below their earlier peak. Month by month, online vs offline. Default sort: largest online drop (peak→Jun) first.
Connections
0
Online drop (peak→Jun)
$0
Online total (Jan-Jun)
$0
Offline total (Jan-Jun)
$0
Online Churn: connections with online sales in Jan–Apr that dropped to $0 in May, Jun (and Jul) and keep buying through Offline. Month by month, online vs offline. Default sort: largest historical online (revenue that left the online channel) first.
Connections
0
Online total lost (Jan-Jun)
$0
Offline total (Jan-Jun)
$0
Churn List — companies with recent online churn (last online month was Mar/Apr/May, online = $0 in June, still buying offline), i.e. churn happened in Apr, May or Jun 2026. Grouped by company (company IDs unify location variants like "Bill Doran ..."; near-identical names are also merged). Prioritized by how recent the churn is, then by online lost.

Stopped buying online — buyer companies that had online sales in Jan–Mar but $0 online in Apr–Jun while still buying offline. Grouped by buyer company (with account owner) so it's easy to action. Sorted by prior online (biggest first).

Easy Handshake connections buying offline — buyers whose K2K connection was created via Easy Handshake that buy mostly/only offline (online ≤ 30% of their total in Apr–Jun). Grouped by buyer with account owner.

Wholesaler upsell — wholesaler buyers with large offline volume (≥ $10k in Apr–Jun) and $0 online from a given company (vendor). Grouped by vendor × buyer: multiple customer records of the same buyer under one vendor (e.g. all "Bill Doran" locations under Sunburst Farms) are consolidated into one row — see Locations and Customer IDs. K2K: Yes = active connection exists; No = no connection (connect-first). Buyers with a mix are split into a Yes row (connected locations) and a No row (the rest).
